must_not_find.label: open frontier markers
must_not_find.pattern: No theorem-level proof is currently present in this repository|Formally conditional on|Formally open at|\bOpen\.|proof sketch only|conjectural|conditional

must_not_find.label: premature completion claims
must_not_find.pattern: verified via|VERIFIED via|closure follows if|assuming|under hypothesis

forbid_mixed_states.label: simultaneous open and complete markers
forbid_mixed_states.open_pattern: No theorem-level proof is currently present in this repository|Formally conditional on|Formally open at|\bOpen\.|proof sketch only|conjectural|conditional
forbid_mixed_states.closed_pattern: Unconditional closure achieved|Completion status:\s*COMPLETE|Theorem-level proof complete|\bVERIFIED\b|QED
